info.title: myAgenci.ai Mobile App API
info.description: REST API for myAgenci.ai Mobile Application.

post.summary: Register a new developer user (Admin only)
post.description: Creates a new developer user account. Requires an authenticated admin user (super_admin role).

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not a super_admin

post.description: Authenticates a mobile user with email and password. Returns a Sanctum bearer token on success.
Revokes the bearer token used in this request.

message.example: You have been signed out successfully.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user, including their assigned role and branch.

Returns KPIs, pipeline funnel, source distribution, financials, today's follow-ups, pending reminders, recent leads, branch performance, team performance, and 6-month trend. All sections respect the same filters as the web dashboard.
Returns a paginated list of leads. Supports search, filtering by branch, source, status, priority, assigned user, product, and date range.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across company name, contact name, mobile, email, product

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter leads up to this date (Y-m-d)

post.description: Creates a new lead. Optionally accepts a `reminder` object — if provided, a reminder is automatically created and linked to the new lead.

reminder.description: Optional reminder to create along with the lead

reminder_created.description: true if a reminder was also created

get.description: Returns full details of a lead including branch, assigned user, call updates, reminders, products, and quotations.

put.description: Updates all fields of an existing lead.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a lead. The record is retained in the database but excluded from all queries.

patch.description: Updates only the lead_status field. Useful for kanban-style drag-and-drop or quick status changes.

get.summary: Get lead filter options (enums, branches, users, products)
get.description: Returns all enum values, active branches, active users, and known product names. Use this to populate filter dropdowns and create/edit forms.

post.summary: Add a call update to a lead
Add a reminder to a lead
Add a product to a lead

delete.summary: Delete a product from a lead

post.summary: Record a payment for a lead product
Create a quotation for a lead

LeadSummary.description: Compact lead representation used in list views

LeadDetail.description: Full lead record with all related data

LeadStats.description: Aggregate stats shown on the leads dashboard

pipeline.description: Sum of deal_value for non-won/lost leads

tags.name: Leads
tags.description: Lead management endpoints for mobile app

tags.name: Lead Sub-Resources
tags.description: Call updates, reminders, products, payments, and quotations on a lead
